title: KhushantGaming's FPS Booster
description: Boost your FPS and smoothen gameplay on any PC! A Fabric-based Minecraft 1.16.5 modpack designed for performance, lag reduction, and ultra-low-end machines.
body:
# 🎮 KhushantGaming's FPS Booster

**KhushantGaming’s FPS Booster** is a lightweight **Fabric-based modpack for Minecraft 1.16.5** that massively boosts performance and frame rates—especially for players on low-end PCs or laptops.

Built for **smooth, lag-free gameplay**, this pack combines the best performance-enhancing mods in the community to give you up to **200–300% more FPS** than vanilla, without sacrificing stability or game feel.

## 🚀 Key Features
- ⚡ Up to 3× FPS improvement over vanilla Minecraft
- 🧠 Smarter CPU and RAM usage using cutting-edge optimizations
- ⚙️ Seamless world loading, faster chunk rendering, quicker game startup
- 🔧 Pre-configured for best performance out-of-the-box
- 🖥️ Minimal visual tweaks for better aesthetics without lag

## 📦 Mod Highlights
- **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Phosphor**, **FerriteCore**, **LazyDFU**, **EntityCulling**, **Dynamic FPS**, and more.

## 🧪 Ideal For
- Low-end systems, streamers, devs
